mapper.select: SELECT id, video_id, title, description, tags_json, source, confirmed, created_at, updated_at FROM video_metadata WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, video_id, title, description, tags_json, source, confirmed, created_at, updated_at FROM video_metadata WHERE video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_metadata (id, video_id, title, description, tags_json, source, confirmed, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.MetadataIdTypeHandler}, #{videoId, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.VideoIdTypeHandler}, #{title}, #{description}, #{tags, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, #{source, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{confirmed}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE video_metadata SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, tags_json = #{tags, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler}, source = #{source, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, confirmed = #{confirmed}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.grace.platform.shared.infrastructure.persistence.typehandler.MetadataIdTypeHandler}
